title: TECHSHOTS | OpenAI Launches Agent Builder to Compete with n8n and Zapier in AI Workflow Automation
full_text:
Thursday , 25 June , 2026
OpenAI Launches Agent Builder to Compete with n8n and Zapier in AI Workflow Automation
By Isha
AI
OpenAI has introduced Agent Builder, a visual, drag-and-drop tool designed to create AI workflows, positioning itself against platforms like n8n and Zapier. Users can build agent flows from templates, incorporating modular components such as logic notes, connectors, and data transformation steps. The platform aims to streamline the development of customer service bots, Q&A agents, and document comparison tools.
Read full story at Geek Flare
Tags: openai workflow development
